creator: linus.sundqvist@loopia.se
text:
Created attachment 242474
Kanboard update to 1.2.29

Changes: https://github.com/kanboard/kanboard/releases/tag/v1.2.29

This is also includes a security patch: A low-privileged attacker with permission to attach a document on a vulnerable Kanboard instance can trick the victim into pasting malicious screenshot data and achieve cross-site scripting if CSP is improperly configured.

https://github.com/kanboard/kanboard/security/advisories/GHSA-hjmw-gm82-r4gv
